text:
RUE (TVS
launched its newer version of Victor, Hero launched its Karizma, and Bajaj is doing
well with Pulsar!)
Information technology will grow by leaps and bounds. Internet companies will do
better. Things will improve for them, but they cannot expect miracles to happen.
Internet penetration will increase multi fold, and more and more people will buy
computers & get connected to the Internet. The volume can be expected to increase by
20 per cent. In the mid-year, Internet companies will have some difficulties in
maintaining growth & meeting targets.
FMCGs will do well. There will be new launches in the higher end segments.
Sale of milk products will increase in volume. Gold and silver prizes will have
marginal increase. TRUE Some of the multinational companies will find it difficult to
deal with the aggressive policies of Indian companies. Indian companies will gather
courage and confidence in terms of dealing with MNCs and competitors.
